title: Figure 3 in Molecular identification of Trichinella species by multiplex PCR: new insight for Trichinella murrelli
author: Karadjian, Grégory
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 3. Alignment of the 256 bp fragment of ITS1 II of Trichinella murrelli obtained by uniplex PCR.BLAST analysis revealed 99.6% identity with different clones of T. murrelli, including clone 5 (Accession number KC006421).
steps_raw: Figure 3. Alignment of the 256 bp fragment of ITS1 II of Trichinella murrelli obtained by uniplex PCR.BLAST analysis revealed 99.6% identity with different clones of T. murrelli, including clone 5 (Accession number KC006421).
